name: Three Pepper Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 medium red bell pepper, cut into strips
1 medium yellow bell pepper, cut into strips
1 medium poblano peppers, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into strips and set aside.
2. Spray a large skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Place skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add pork strips to hot skillet and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes or until done. Remove from skillet.
5. Add bell pepper strips and chili peppers to the hot skillet. Cook about 3 minutes or until bell peppers are slightly tender but still crisp.
6. In a small bowl, stir together remaining ingredients: sugar, soy sauce, gingerroot, sesame oil, and rice wine vinegar.
7. Add the mixture to the skillet with peppers and meat. Cook and stir until heated through, about 2 minutes.
